creator: meka@tilda.center
text:
Created attachment 221696
ardour-debug.txt

Although it was somewhat obvious it's lilv from original report, I wanted to build everything from scratch with debug symbols and then run it through lldb to get nicer output. As it seams, lilv is broken by new serd. I'll try to come up with the smallest code that breaks in the same way and then report it upstream (drobilla is author of serd and lilv).
